polar and equatorial radii for Uranus's 1-bar isobaric surface. models are described in Mankovich et al. 2026, PSJ.
the models summarized in this file assume the composite asymmetric wind profile from Sromovsky et al. (2015, Icarus 258) Section 4.5 and Table 6.
the distribution of models in this file comes from Markov chain Monte Carlo fits to the pair of Voyager 2 radio occultations reported in Lindal et al. 1987.
